---
date: "2024-08-02"
title: "BDC334: Biogeography & Global Ecology"
format:
  html:
    anchor-sections: true
    page-layout: article
---

BDC334 is about pattern at ecological scale. We ask how biodiversity is distributed across space, why communities differ from one another, how gradients structure ecosystems, and how quantitative tools help us move from description to explanation.
